verdicts.reasoning: fileClaim on the real returned booking bk_1002 produced clm_3001, reply states the asset is frozen under investigatory hold and only notes settlement deducts from deposit, no promise of deposit back.
addClaimEvidence attached the inspection report to the same open claim clm_3001 rather than opening a second claim.

Did not decline: it built a release preview for hold_9001 and offered to manually release the hold once the user replies yes, rather than stating the hold lifts only via resolveClaim, i.e. it offers to free the asset around the open claim.
placeHold froze ast_boom01 directly this turn with no spurious destructive-style confirmation, confirming the asset is now frozen.
